prompts.title: Define Learning Outcomes
prompts.body: Given source content and audience profile, define measurable learning outcomes using action verbs and clear success criteria.

versions.body: Given source content and audience profile, define measurable learning outcomes using action verbs and clear success criteria.

prompts.title: Design Learning Activities
prompts.body: Design learner activities that directly map to each outcome. Include modality, estimated time, and facilitator guidance.

versions.body: Design learner activities that directly map to each outcome. Include modality, estimated time, and facilitator guidance.

prompts.title: Design Aligned Assessment
prompts.body: Create assessment items aligned to each learning outcome, with answer key and marking notes.

versions.body: Create assessment items aligned to each learning outcome, with answer key and marking notes.

workflows.name: Outcomes to Assessment Workflow
workflows.description: Build outcomes, activities, and assessment from source content.
workflows.artefacts: Source text, learner profile, delivery format
workflows.scopeAndConstraints: Single lesson, 60-minute learner effort, plain language, accessibility-aware.

steps.title: Define outcomes
steps.notes: Keep 3-5 outcomes max and make each measurable.

steps.title: Create activities
steps.notes: Map each activity to one or more outcomes.

steps.title: Build assessment
steps.notes: Assessment must cover all outcomes and include answer key.
